title: BEM-844 force response retry

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 19:57 (UTC+3)'
# Force a fresh BEM-840 response request and dispatch, regardless of previous conditional route ambiguity.
req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem844_force_protocol_response_retry.md')
req.write_text('# BEM-844 | FORCE RETRY | CLAUDE PROTOCOL RESPONSE REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide a real response to BEM-840 protocol agreement request.'+sep+'Write to: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_protocol_agreement_response.md'+sep+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+sep+'Required: protocol table with Agent, Responsibility, Trigger, Evidence, Failure handling. Include exact blocker if blocked. Do not write issue comments.'+sep)
q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_force_claude_protocol_response_dispatch.json')
q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 force retry for real BEM-840 Claude protocol response','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
watch=Path('governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json')
watch.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.v3','status':'active_waiting_for_bem840_response_retry','checked_at':created,'interval_minutes':1,'checks':[{'time':created,'status':'force_retry_written','request':str(req),'queue':str(q)}],'operator_role':'none','target_response':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_protocol_agreement_response.md'},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':'forced_bem840_response_retry_queued','request':str(req),'queue':str(q),'watchdog':str(watch),'next_action':'fresh tick then verify real BEM-840 Claude response','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_force_bem840_response_retry.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_force_bem840_response_retry.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Force BEM-840 Response Retry | QUEUED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick then verify real BEM-840 Claude response. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+'Forced BEM-840 response retry queued. Next: tick and verify.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(req),str(q),str(watch),'governance/state/bem844_force_bem840_response_retry.json','governance/reports/bem844_force_bem840_response_retry.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Forced a fresh BEM-840 protocol response retry request, queued Claude dispatcher, and refreshed watchdog state')
